name: smartcrm
description: AI-native mini CRM for Xeno engineering assignment

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w @smartcrm/api" "npm run dev -w @smartcrm/channel" "npm run dev -w @smartcrm/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @smartcrm/shared && npm run build -w @smartcrm/api && npm run build -w @smartcrm/channel && npm run build -w @smartcrm/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @smartcrm/shared && npm run typecheck -w @smartcrm/api && npm run typecheck -w @smartcrm/channel && npm run typecheck -w @smartcrm/web
